Vendored motion library notices
================================

Three.js
--------
Version: 0.185.1
Vendored files: three.core.min.js, three.module.min.js
Artifact SHA-256:

Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/three/v/0.185.1
Upstream source: https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js
Retrieved tarball: https://registry.npmjs.org/three/-/three-0.185.1.tgz
Package integrity: sha512-5aojFCXKwnjBRZvUnt3WFfEcvUJgkN5LlijRFN95hMy8WVkG4I0QNcJE+OuWvuJ0bOdStrbfXn0pkd6/QyiAlg==

all copies or substantial portions of the Software.

GSAP
----
Version: 3.15.0
Vendored files: gsap.min.js, ScrollTrigger.min.js
Artifact SHA-256:
  gsap.min.js  92bb9a96476f983d212a2bc4f54c889039c1696dd4461d40a736860938570fbb
  ScrollTrigger.min.js  b0b14d67b55b0c43c756ac0b106cfcb09d0879945f6ead64451065b0672916a2
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/gsap/v/3.15.0
Upstream source: https://github.com/greensock/GSAP
Retrieved tarball: https://registry.npmjs.org/gsap/-/gsap-3.15.0.tgz
Package integrity: sha512-dMW4CWBTUK1AEEDeZc1g4xpPGIrSf9fJF960qbTZmN/QwZIWY5wgliS6JWl9/25fpTGJrMRtSjGtOmPnfjZB+A==
License: GSAP Standard "No Charge" License
License text: https://gsap.com/standard-license/
Copyright: GreenSock, Inc.

GSAP is subject to GreenSock's Standard License rather than an open-source
license. Review the upstream license URL above for the complete terms.

Current use record: GSAP is used only on AgentDock's own public website. It is
not offered as a resellable site-building or animation feature. Based on the
Standard License's "No Charge" terms, this current use is treated as permitted;
this is not legal advice. Re-review the license if the product use changes.
